tasks.instruction: Uzupełnij zdania, wstawiając wyrazy podane w nawiasach w odpowiedniej formie. Wymagana jest pełna poprawność gramatyczna i ortograficzna odpowiedzi.

items.context: Our roof was damaged in the storm, so next week we _________ (have) it _________ (repair).
This bridge _________ (build) in 1890 and it _________ (use) by thousands of people every day since then.
Mum doesn't cut my hair herself; she always _________ (get) it _________ (cut) at the salon in town.
The thieves had already escaped by the time the alarm _________ (set off), so they _________ (never / catch).
If the report _________ (write) more carefully, fewer mistakes _________ (make) by the students.
By the end of the month, the new stadium _________ (finish), and the first match _________ (play) there a week later.
